headline: Ready when you are
body: Describe the matter, paste a notice, or name the sections in play. I research on AnrakLegal, verify every citation, and help you draft.

headline: How can I help today?
body: Tell me the facts, the forum, and what you need. I'll pull the cases and statutes, then prepare a clean first draft.

headline: Let's get started
body: Try: research a point under the BNS, check a citation, or draft a legal notice. Ask anything about your matter.

headline: Tell me what you need
body: I can research case law and statutes, verify citations, draft documents, and organise your file. Just describe the task.

headline: Jolly LLB, at your service
body: Share the brief or a question to begin. I keep replies clear and cite the authorities I rely on.

headline: Ready.
body: State the matter. I'll research and draft.

headline: Awaiting instructions
body: Give me the facts and the relief sought. Sourced answers, clean drafts.

headline: Go ahead.
body: Ask. I'll search AnrakLegal, verify the citation, return the draft. No filler.

headline: Standing by
body: One line of instruction is enough. I'll expand only where it matters.

headline: Your instruction
body: A question, a section, or a notice to draft. I handle the rest.

headline: Research desk open
body: Provide the issue, jurisdiction, and statute. I search cases and sections, resolve citations, and validate the output.

headline: Awaiting the brief
body: Send the facts to begin research. Supports case-law search, statute lookup, citation verification, and drafting.

headline: Ready for dispatch
body: Enter the task. I plan, research on AnrakLegal, cross-check each authority, and return a sourced draft.

headline: Inputs accepted
body: Natural language or a precise issue. Typical flow: facts, research, verify citations, draft, review.

headline: Tools initialised
body: Case search, statute sections, citation resolver, vault precedents. Describe the matter; I return sourced work.

headline: A blank page, a settled question of law
body: What shall we draft? Bring the facts, a half-formed argument, or a difficult clause, and I'll shape it into a sound document.

headline: A fresh file, a clear line of reasoning
body: Give me the point you want to make and I'll research the authorities, then frame an argument you can stand behind.

headline: Let's draft something sound
body: Describe the position you want to take. I'll gather cases, statutes, and precedents into a workable first draft.

headline: New matter, careful beginnings
body: Bring an intent, not a finished plan. We can outline the argument, research it, and refine the language together.

headline: Where shall the argument begin?
body: Tell me what you're trying to establish. I'll draw on precedent, adapt model clauses, and leave you a tidy draft.

headline: Let's work through the law
body: Ask about any section, judgment, or procedure. I'll explain the reasoning, not just the rule, with a worked example.

headline: What shall we examine today?
body: Bring a clause to interpret, a provision to unpack, or a case to understand. I'll guide you through it step by step.

headline: Ready to walk you through it
body: Share the question. I'll break it into parts, explain each, and leave you able to handle the next one yourself.

headline: Bring me a question
body: We'll read the statute together, find the governing principle, and build understanding you can reuse in the next matter.

headline: Let's start with the principle
body: Name the topic or paste the provision. Expect plain explanations, the leading authorities, and practice questions.

headline: Happy to help, let's begin!
body: Share the matter and I'll handle it with real care. Research, citation checks, and drafting, all done gently and thoroughly.

headline: Jolly LLB is here for you
body: Tell me what you're working on. Big briefs or small notices alike, I'll take it on warmly and get it right.

headline: Let's work on this together
body: Bring a question, a goal, or a whole file. I'll organise it kindly and leave you a clean, well-cited draft.

headline: Ready and glad to assist
body: One task at a time, done neatly. I research the law, verify the citations, and make your file feel manageable again.

headline: Here and ready to help
body: Say hello or share the facts. No matter too small, no file too tangled, we'll work through it together.

headline: Attentive and ready
body: Share a document, a fine point, or the whole brief. I notice the small things: a misquoted section, an unverified citation.

headline: Ready to work, precisely
body: Describe the task. I'll research, draft, and review with a careful eye, especially the citations others overlook.

headline: New matter opened
body: Give me the goal and I'll track it through the authorities, reading closely, checking each reference, missing nothing.

headline: Quiet, thorough, watchful
body: Bring the facts or a draft. I work the way good research should: patiently, exactly, with an eye on every citation.

headline: Jolly LLB, paying attention
body: Say the word and I'll read your file, verify the citations, and return a draft with nothing out of place.

headline: Ready to set out on the matter
body: Name what you're after, a notice, a clause, a point of law, and I'll chase down the authorities and bring them back.

headline: Jolly LLB at the helm
body: Point me at the file and I'll navigate the case law, check the citations, and hand you a sound, sturdy draft.

headline: What's the task before us?
body: Give me the facts and the relief you seek. I'll steer through the statute, verify each authority, and return with solid work.

headline: Course set, ready to begin
body: Tell me where to look. I research, draft, and cite with the discipline of a steady, seasoned crew.

headline: Awaiting your orders
body: Bring a matter, a section, or a rough idea. I'll work the authorities and return with reliable, well-cited drafting.

headline: Pray, what matter dost thou bring?
body: Speak thy facts, thy section, thy disputed clause, and I shall research it with a scholar's hand and an honest citation.

headline: Jolly LLB standeth ready
body: Name the question that vexeth thee. I shall read the authorities, weigh them, and render a draft most fair and sound.

headline: What tidings from thy matter?
body: Present thy brief or thy aim. I'll traverse the cases and statutes, verify each citation, and report in plain terms.

headline: The page awaits thy instruction
body: Describe thy purpose, good counsel. The argument shall be framed, the authorities checked, the draft set down with care.

headline: Speak, and I shall set to work
body: A line of instruction sufficeth. I research, I draft, I verify, and leave thy file in good and ordered keeping.

headline: Ready when you are
body: Bring the facts, a tricky clause, or a citation to check. We'll work it through calmly: research, verify, draft.

headline: Things look clear, ready to begin
body: Share the matter or the point that's holding you up. We'll paddle in, research it properly, and come back with a draft.

headline: Settled and ready to help
body: Tell me the task: a notice, a clause, a point of law. I'll research, verify the citations, and keep things unhurried.

headline: Glad to help, take your time
body: Small query or full brief, just point me at it. I handle the research and drafting; you keep a clear head.

headline: Ready to begin
body: Name the task and we're underway. I research, verify, draft, and leave your file clean and well organised.

headline: Another file, another late night
body: Tell me what the matter turns on. I'll read the papers, check the authorities, and leave a sound draft on the desk by morning.

headline: The page is blank. I'm listening.
body: You've got a question of law. I've got patience and the authorities. Name the issue and I'll work it until it gives.

headline: Jolly LLB. Legal research.
body: Hand me the facts, the suspect clause, the doubtful citation. I read between the lines and come back with what holds up.

headline: Quiet night, open file
body: Every weak argument leaves a trail. Give me the matter and a lead; I'll follow it through the case law and close the gap.

headline: No matter too small
body: A single section, a shaky precedent, a whole tangled brief, hand it over. I'll bring back verified, sourced work.

headline: Here and happy to help
body: Share a document or a goal and I'll handle it gently. I research, verify the citations, and draft, with care at every step.

headline: Jolly LLB is listening
body: Tell me the task, however small. I promise clean drafts, careful citation checks, and a calm, reassuring hand on your file.

headline: Quietly getting to work
body: Share the point that's troubling you. I'll find the governing authority, verify it, and leave you a tidy, sound draft.

headline: Let's sort this out together
body: Give me the matter or the question and I'll take care of it. Patient with hard problems, gentle with you throughout.

headline: Awaiting your instruction
body: I can research the law, verify citations, draft notices, and organise your file. Just say the word, and rest easy.

headline: To advise is first to inquire
body: What question sits before you? Describe it, and we shall examine its facts, the governing law, and the soundest answer.

headline: A blank page, an open mind
body: Every dispute is a question of principle. Share yours; I'll research, reason from the authorities, and return a sourced draft.

headline: Begin with a single question
body: What do you wish to establish, or to understand? I'll reason from first principles of the law, research it, and verify.

headline: Consider the matter, then speak
body: Describe the end you seek. I pursue it through the cases, statutes, and precedents, and report what the authorities hold.

headline: The unexamined argument should not be filed
body: Share a brief, a puzzle, or a principle. I'll trace the reasoning, propose a position, and justify it with authority.

headline: Ready to get to work
body: Bring the matter, the brief, that difficult point of law. I'm focused. Sourced research, verified citations, clean drafts.

headline: Jolly LLB, ready and sharp
body: Hand me the task and watch it come together. Cases researched, citations checked, drafts prepared, all done right.

headline: New matter, full focus
body: Bring the toughest question you've got. I'll research, verify, draft, and organise it with everything I've got.

headline: Locked in and ready
body: Describe the task. I'll move through the authorities, confirm every citation, and leave you a draft you can rely on.

headline: Ready to make this count
body: Small query or major brief, it doesn't matter. I'm preparing sound, well-cited work today. Name the task and let's begin.

headline: Jolly LLB is ready.
body: Describe a matter, paste a notice, or name the sections in play. I research on AnrakLegal, verify citations, and help you draft.

headline: What are we working on today?
body: Describe the matter in your own words. I'll research the law, explain my approach, and check in before anything goes on record.

headline: Start anywhere.
body: Share the facts, a citation to check, or a rough idea. I'll research, suggest next steps, and cite the authorities I rely on.

headline: Your file, one prompt away.
body: Research case law and statutes, verify citations, draft documents, organise the matter. Tell me the goal and I'll prepare the groundwork.

headline: Ready when you are.
body: Share a task, a question, or a draft. I cite my sources, verify every citation, and flag anything that needs an advocate's judgment.
